title: Swing Animation Plus
description: Swing Animation Plus changes the player’s attack swing animation.
body:
Swing Animations is a client-side mod for Minecraft that replaces the default attack swing with smoother and more polished animations. The mod slightly reworks combat movement visuals while keeping the vanilla feel and compatibility with most servers.

Features:
- Custom attack swing animations
- Smooth and clean first-person movement
- Vanilla-friendly style
- Lightweight and fully client-side
- Built for Fabric

Perfect for players who want combat to look more dynamic without changing gameplay mechanics.
